sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ أَنْ تَزُورَ الْجِبَالَ فِي الشَّمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je željela posjetiti planine na sjeveru.
sentences.translationEn: The family wanted to visit the mountains in the north.

sentences.translation: Iznajmili su auto i krenuli ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: They rented a car and traveled in the morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّرِيقُ طَوِيلًا لَكِنَّ الْمَنَاظِرَ جَمِيلَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Put je bio dug ali su prizori bili lijepi.
sentences.translationEn: The road was long but the scenery was beautiful.

sentences.arabic: نَزَلُوا عِنْدَ نَهْرٍ صَغِيرٍ وَشَرِبُوا الشَّاي.
sentences.translation: Zaustavili su se pored malog potoka i popili čaj.
sentences.translationEn: They stopped by a small river and drank tea.
